issue_title: Filled icons from sprite are drawn non-filled
issue_body_preview:
### Description

I suppose this behaviour is due to the filled icons are imported with attributes `<symbol id="tabler-filled-bell" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" ...`. One possible workaround could possibly be changing `fill` attribute to `currentColor` for filled icons

### Package

- [ ] @table
test_description_zh: 在页面中通过 SVG sprite 方式引用 filled 类型的图标（例如 tabler-filled-bell），观察图标的填充渲染效果。
expected_result_zh: Filled 类型的图标应以实心填充样式正确渲染，图标内部区域被 currentColor 填充，而非显示为空心/描边样式。
